description: Add task statuses so users can track whether work is pending, in progress, or done.

userStories.title: Add task status schema/migration
userStories.description: As a system, I want to store a status value for each task so that existing tasks default to pending.
acceptanceCriteria: Add status column to tasks table with default 'pending'

userStories.title: Add backend action to update task status
userStories.description: As a system, I want to update the status of a task so that users can save their progress.
acceptanceCriteria: Create backend API or action to update task status

userStories.title: Show status badge on task cards
userStories.description: As a user, I want to see the current status as a badge on task cards so that I know the state of the task.
acceptanceCriteria: Verify in browser using playwright-cli skill

userStories.title: Add status control to task rows
userStories.description: As a user, I want to change a task's status from the task list so that I can easily update task progress.
acceptanceCriteria: Task rows have a dropdown or buttons to change status
Changing status saves immediately via backend action
Verify in browser using playwright-cli skill

userStories.title: Add status filter to task list
userStories.description: As a user, I want to filter the task list by status so that I can focus on specific tasks.
acceptanceCriteria: Task list has a filter control for status
Selecting a status updates the list of tasks
Verify in browser using playwright-cli skill
